block.text: Tm sorry,' replies the Information Robot. 'We have a general medical display in Hall Omicron, but for the kind of specific information you want, you would need to inquire at a hospital, or at the College of Medicine.' If you want to leave the museum, turn tot02. If you want to ask another question, return to 14 and make another choice.

choice.text: If you want to ask another question.
